cancellation.title: Cancellation Policy
cancellation.intro: At Brow Loft, we value your time and truly appreciate you choosing us for your beauty services. To ensure we can accommodate all our clients smoothly, we kindly ask for advance notice if you need to cancel or reschedule your appointment.
long_appointments_items: Please provide at least 24 hours' notice for cancellations or changes.
Appointments cancelled with less than 24 hours' notice may be recorded as a no-show and could affect future booking privileges.
short_appointments_items: We kindly request a minimum of 3 hours' notice for cancellations or rescheduling.
Late cancellations may be considered a no-show and may impact your ability to schedule future appointments.
cancellation.closing_note: We understand that unexpected situations can arise. If you experience an emergency or special circumstance, please contact us directly and we will do our best to assist you.

parking_payment.burnaby_parking: In our Burnaby location, while there is no dedicated parking on-site, public and paid parking options are available nearby. We recommend checking surrounding streets and local parking lots for availability.
parking_payment.langley_parking: Complimentary street parking is available nearby. Guests may park directly back of the building or along surrounding streets, subject to local parking guidelines and time limits.
parking_payment.title: Parking & Payment Information
parking_payment.parking_note: We recommend allowing a few extra minutes to find parking during busy hours.
parking_payment.payment_closing: All major payment methods are welcomed in-salon.

lash_lift_items: Have active eye infections, irritation, or skin conditions around the eye area
Are taking medications such as blood thinners
brow_tint_items: Have active eye or skin conditions
Are taking medications including blood thinners
safety.intro: Your comfort and safety are important to us. If you are unsure whether a service is appropriate for you, we encourage you to contact us before booking. Complimentary patch testing is available prior to your appointment to help identify any potential sensitivities or allergic reactions.

safety.brow_tint_intro: This service may not be recommended for clients who:
safety.brow_tint_note: Please Note: Brow tint enhances the colour of existing brow hairs and does not permanently stain the skin to fill sparse areas. Tint results typically last up to approximately five weeks, gradually fading over time. Results may vary slightly depending on individual factors such as skin type, hair texture, and aftercare routine.
safety.lash_lift_note: If you have any concerns, please consult with us before scheduling your appointment.
safety.closing: If you require additional clarification regarding any of our services, our team will be happy to assist you.
safety.title: Service Considerations & Safety
